description: Use this API to purge an OPF interface flow constraint record, including all of its participating branches, from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_intflw(ifid)

parameters.name: ifid
parameters.description: Interface flow identifier. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: unable to remove interface flow record due to participation in linear constraint record.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
